container.label: Becoming a CNA in Maine
container.intro: Complete 180 hours of state-approved training and pass the competency exam to be listed on the Maine Registry of Certified Nursing Assistants.

variants.label: Becoming
variants.description: Information on how to become a CNA in ME.

variants.label: State Application
variants.description: Apply for the Maine registry exam.

variants.label: Transfer
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA license to Maine.

board.name: Maine Registry of Certified Nursing Assistants

hero.title: Becoming a CNA in Maine
hero.dek: Learn Maine CNA Registry requirements, complete a robust 180-hour training program, and prepare for the state evaluation.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in Maine | Registry Requirements
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to getting your CNA license in ME. Learn about the 180-hour training requirement and testing.

hero.title: Maine CNA State Exam Application
hero.dek: Apply to take the Maine Nurse Aide competency evaluation.

seo.title: Maine CNA Exam Application | Registry Guide

hero.title: Transfer a CNA License to Maine
hero.dek: Contact the Maine Department of Education for bridging requirements to transfer an out-of-state CNA.

seo.title: Transfer CNA License to Maine | Reciprocity
seo.description: Learn how to transfer your active out-of-state CNA license to ME.
